name: PT Cottonindo Ariesta Tbk
summary: PT Cottonindo Ariesta Tbk manufactures and sells cotton products in Indonesia. The company offers facial cotton pads and cotton buds; cosmetic and medical cotton products, including cotton rolls, dental cotton, mini cotton balls, and cotton ball in various sizes; and industrial cotton products comprising cotton sliver, spunlace cotton pads, bleached cotton, and cotton rolls. It also provides cotton bud manufacturing machines. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Subang, Indonesia.
